title: Check if Matrix Is X-Matrix
titleCn: 判断矩阵是否是一个 X 矩阵

testcases.input: grid = [[2,0,0,1],[0,3,1,0],[0,5,2,0],[4,0,0,2]] Output: true Explanation: Refer to the diagram above. An X-Matrix should have the green elements (diagonals) be non-zero and the red elements be 0. Thus, grid is an X-Matrix.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Refer to the diagram above. An X-Matrix should have the green elements (diagonals) be non-zero and the red elements be 0. Thus, grid is an X-Matrix.

testcases.input: grid = [[5,7,0],[0,3,1],[0,5,0]] Output: false Explanation: Refer to the diagram above. An X-Matrix should have the green elements (diagonals) be non-zero and the red elements be 0. Thus, grid is not an X-Matrix.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: Refer to the diagram above. An X-Matrix should have the green elements (diagonals) be non-zero and the red elements be 0. Thus, grid is not an X-Matrix.
